\tzpentry{ID3887}{Mode Frequency Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3887 introduces Mode Frequency Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Lambda^{\mu}_{\;\;\nu}[\boldsymbol{\omega}, \mathbf{r}] = \begin{pmatrix} \gamma & -\gamma\boldsymbol{\beta} \cdot \hat{\mathbf{n}} \\ -\gamma\boldsymbol{\beta} & \mathbb{I} + (\gamma - 1)\hat{\mathbf{n}} \otimes \hat{\mathbf{n}} \end{pmatrix}, \quad \boldsymbol{\beta} = \frac{\boldsymbol{\omega} \times \mathbf{r}}{c} \end{equation}
